summary: RBAC STEP 2A Testing Complete - 33/33 backend tests PASSED. All 20 admin endpoints successfully migrated from require_admin to require_permission. Super admin has full access, Osservatore role gets 200 on payments/audit/score-summaries but 403 on seasons/matchdays/matches/leagues. Gestore Leghe role gets 200 on seasons/matchdays/matches/leagues but 403 on payments/audit. No role users get 403 on all admin endpoints. refresh-live correctly requires admin.matches.manage.
verified_features: require_admin import completely removed from server.py (verified via grep)
29 endpoints now use require_permission instead of require_admin
Super Admin can access ALL 20 admin endpoints (200 status)
Osservatore role (admin.dashboard.view, admin.audit.view, admin.payments.view) gets: 403 on seasons/matchdays/matches/leagues, 200 on payments/audit/score-summaries

Gestore Leghe role (admin.dashboard.view, admin.seasons.manage, admin.matchdays.manage, admin.matches.manage, admin.leagues.manage) gets: 200 on seasons/matchdays/matches/leagues, 403 on payments/audit
User with NO role gets 403 on ALL admin endpoints
Non-admin endpoints (login, home, profile) work without any role/permission
endpoints_with_internal_permission_check: GET /api/admin/v3/leagues - uses internal is_super check and league ownership
GET /api/admin/v3/matchdays - uses internal is_super check and league ownership
POST /api/admin/matchday/{id}/transition - uses internal is_super check and league ownership
POST /api/admin/matches/{id}/special - uses internal is_super check and league ownership
POST /api/admin/real-fixtures/import - uses internal is_super check and league ownership
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation is correct - require_admin removed, require_permission used for all 20 target endpoints
Some endpoints (v3/*, transition, override, recalculate, special, fixtures/leagues/search/import) correctly use internal permission logic rather than require_permission per spec 'NO changes'
seed_data_creation: Tests dynamically assign/remove roles to standard user for each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC STEP 2A complete. All 20 admin endpoints now use require_permission instead of require_admin. 9 additional endpoints (v3/*, transition, override, recalculate, special, fixtures/*) use internal permission logic and were NOT changed per spec. Next step would be STEP 2B if there are additional endpoints to migrate.
